changes_summary: docs/architecture.md updated for v8.0.0: (1) Added v8.0.0 count line '18 agents · 29 skills' at top. (2) Architecture Overview mermaid diagram updated: SKL[29 Skills], 18-agent subgraph with new agent names (analyst/test-engineer/browser-agent), TOML overlay layer (core/overlay subgraph + customization/*.toml + customization/steps nodes + /setup-agents skill node). (3) Diagram narrative updated: replaced old agent names with v8.0.0 names, documented analyst --phase flags, browser-agent --phase flags, test-engineer --e2e flag, /setup-agents one-shot scanner, step override mechanism. (4) Model Selection table updated: new agent names with phase flags. (5) Mode Flags section added (--yolo / default / --step-mode). (6) Steps Decomposition section added with step counts table and named-phase migration table. (7) All 3 pipeline mermaid diagrams updated with new agent names and step counts. (8) State Management (v8.0.0) section added: additive keys analyst_triage.*, analyst_impact.*, mode_flag, overlay_source, pipeline-status dedup. (9) Core Contracts section: added core/overlay/ sub-namespace description + plugin permission constraint note. (10) Scalability Boundaries: updated 'Code-analyst files' row to 'Analyst impact files'.
